concepts.name: Nash Equilibrium
concepts.canonical_definition: A strategy profile where no player can unilaterally improve their payoff
concepts.formal_spec: sigma* in Sigma s.t. forall i, u_i(sigma*) >= u_i(sigma_i, sigma*_{-i})

concepts.name: action space
concepts.canonical_definition: The set of all available strategies for a player
concepts.formal_spec: A_i = finite set of pure strategies for player i

concepts.name: utility function
concepts.canonical_definition: A function mapping strategy profiles to real-valued payoffs for each player
concepts.formal_spec: u_i: Sigma -> R, maps joint strategy profiles to player i payoff

concepts.name: price of anarchy
concepts.canonical_definition: Ratio of worst Nash equilibrium social welfare to optimal social welfare
concepts.formal_spec: PoA = W(OPT) / min_{sigma in NE} W(sigma)

concepts.name: coalition
concepts.canonical_definition: A subset of players who coordinate deviations jointly
concepts.formal_spec: S subset N, where N is the set of all players

concepts.name: k-strong equilibrium
concepts.canonical_definition: A strategy profile where no coalition of size at most k can profitably deviate
concepts.formal_spec: sigma* is k-SE iff forall S with |S| <= k, forall sigma_S in Sigma_S, exists i in S: u_i(sigma*) >= u_i(sigma_S, sigma*_{-S})

concepts.name: Nash Equilibrium
concepts.canonical_definition: Fixed point of best-response dynamics in a strategic-form game
concepts.formal_spec: sigma* s.t. sigma_i* in BR_i(sigma*_{-i}) for all players i

concepts.name: congestion game
concepts.canonical_definition: A game where player payoffs depend only on the number of players using each resource
concepts.formal_spec: G = (N, R, (A_i), (c_r)) where c_r: N -> R is resource cost
